text_original: 90% of this is "Futa", transgender and femboys who try to force themselves on you. If you don't want your children subjected to that, don't let them use this app. The developers allow it. They couldn't care less. And the fact that there's no age restriction to use it should be criminal. They replied saying how much they want to protect the community. BULLS###!!! THIS APP SHOULD NOT BE AVAILABLE WHERE CHILDREN CAN ACCESS IT. THE DEVELOPER STILL ALLOWS VERY ""XXX"" CONTENT EASILY VIEWED!!!
text_zh: 这里面90%都是“扶他”、跨性别者和伪娘，他们会试图强行纠缠你。如果你不想让你的孩子接触到这些，就不要让他们使用这个应用。开发者允许这种行为。他们根本不在乎。而且，使用该应用没有任何年龄限制，这简直是犯罪。他们回复说他们有多想保护这个社区。放屁！！！这个应用根本不应该让儿童接触到。开发者仍然允许极其“XXX”的内容被轻易看到！！！
reply_original: Thank you for your updated feedback. We hear your frustration and take safety seriously. We strictly moderate content to comply with Google Play policies. If you see inappropriate bots, please send screenshots or details to support@fantachat.ai so we can ban them immediately. We are committed to keeping our community safe.
reply_zh: 感谢您提供最新的反馈。我们非常理解您的沮丧，并高度重视安全问题。我们严格审核内容，以符合 Google Play 的政策。如果您发现任何不当的机器人，请将截图或详细信息发送至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们立即对其进行封禁。我们致力于保障社区的安全。
